title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Continue
scenario: Account login/logout flow in App Settings > General > Account on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Tap 'Continue' and log in with valid credentials.
5. Verify that 'Your account' text appears with populated Name and Email fields.
7. Verify that a login dialog opens with 'Cancel' and 'Continue' options.
9. Verify that the user is logged out, 'Your account' text shows 'You aren't currently logged in', and the 'Log in' button is visible.
expected: After logging in, 'Your account' text appears with populated Name and Email fields. After logging out, the user is logged out, 'Your account' text shows 'You aren't currently logged in', and the 'Log in' button is visible.
